# Statins (statins)

**8 rules.** Category: cardiovascular

| `citrus_bergamot` | ingredient_quality_map | avoid | established | Muscle-toxicity risk with statins | Furanocoumarins inhibit intestinal CYP3A4 → ↑ statin AUC 5-15× → rhabdomyolysis risk. Affects simvastatin and lovastatin most; atorvastatin smaller effect; pravastatin and rosuvas… |
| `coq10` | ingredient_quality_map | informational | established | May affect statin tolerability | Statins deplete endogenous CoQ10 by blocking the mevalonate pathway. CoQ10 supplementation is commonly used to mitigate statin-associated myopathy. No adverse pharmacokinetic inte… |

| `milk_thistle` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect statin tolerability | Silymarin inhibits CYP3A4 and OATP1B1 transport, which are primary pathways for simvastatin, lovastatin, and atorvastatin metabolism. Elevated statin plasma levels increase myopat… |
| `st_johns_wort` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | established | May affect statin tolerability | CYP3A4 induction reduces plasma levels of simvastatin, atorvastatin, and other CYP3A4-metabolized statins. |
